title: نصب سریع BluePanel Server با ثبت SSH در مینی‌اپ مرکزی
summary: مدیر فقط مشخصات SSH را در مینی‌اپ مرکزی وارد می‌کند؛ Core اطلاعات را یک‌بارمصرف و رمزگذاری‌شده به GitHub Actions تحویل می‌دهد، بسته server/ روی سرور نصب می‌شود و Agent پس از ثبت و Heartbeat وارد مدار هماهنگ‌کننده می‌شود.
features: adds a central dashboard SSH bootstrap form for password or unencrypted private-key authentication
dispatches a one-time GitHub Actions workflow that securely claims SSH credentials and provisions the target server
deletes encrypted SSH credentials from D1 immediately after the one-time claim
installs Docker and Docker Compose automatically on supported apt, dnf and yum distributions
detects aaPanel and optionally creates an Nginx reverse-proxy path for the server health endpoint
registers an outbound-only BluePanel Server agent and confirms heartbeat before installation is marked successful
moves maintenance scheduling to the server coordinator while retaining Worker fallback when the server is offline
changes: سه جدول D1 برای سرورها، نصب‌های SSH و اجرای فازها به‌صورت خودکار ساخته می‌شود.
رمز یا کلید SSH فقط تا Claim یک‌بارمصرف به‌صورت AES-GCM نگهداری و سپس حذف می‌شود.
توکن ثبت Agent پس از اتصال از فایل env حذف می‌شود و فقط توکن دائمی اختصاصی سرور باقی می‌ماند.
Agent هر ۲۰ ثانیه Heartbeat می‌فرستد و هر نوبت فقط یک فاز نگهداری را با Invocation تازه Core اجرا می‌کند.
در نبود Heartbeat معتبر، Cron قبلی Cloudflare به‌عنوان مسیر پشتیبان ادامه می‌دهد.

deployment.automatic_provisioning: upload this ZIP through the central bot, then enter SSH details in Central Mini App > System > BluePanel Server
deployment.automatic_migration: bluepanel_servers, server_bootstrap_jobs and server_phase_runs are created automatically; no manual SQL is required
deployment.optional_aapanel: when aaPanel and the supplied website domain exist, /bluepanel-server/ reverse proxy is installed automatically
deployment.worker_fallback: enabled when no online server heartbeat is available

security.ssh_credential_storage: AES-GCM encrypted in D1 and deleted on first successful claim
security.claim_token: single-use and valid for up to 60 minutes before claim
security.registration_code: single-use and invalidated after server registration
security.agent_network_mode: outbound-only by default; Docker binds the health API to 127.0.0.1
security.github_logs: SSH secret, report token and registration code are masked and temporary runner files are deleted

validation.worker_syntax: passed: node --check for core, edge and processor
validation.server_agent_local_contract: passed: local mock Core confirmed registration, heartbeat, scheduled phase and manual phase execution
validation.shell_syntax: passed: bash -n for install, update and uninstall scripts
validation.installer_local_contract: passed with mocked Docker and health endpoint; env permissions and registration-code cleanup verified
validation.workflow_yaml: passed: YAML parse and bash -n for every workflow run block
validation.central_miniapp: passed: embedded script syntax, required server form IDs and no duplicate static HTML IDs
validation.secret_lifecycle: passed by static contract: credential ciphertext is nulled on claim and registration code hash is nulled on registration
validation.live_ssh_install: not run; requires a real GitHub repository, Actions permission and target SSH server
validation.live_aapanel_proxy: not run; requires a real aaPanel website configuration

limitations: The first server release acts as a coordinator and starts each maintenance phase in a fresh Core invocation; it is not yet a complete rewrite of every provider operation as native server-side code.
Password-protected private keys are not supported; use SSH password, an unencrypted deployment key, or a root/passwordless-sudo account.
The GitHub workflow must already exist on the configured branch and GitHub Actions must be enabled.
Production connectivity and installation must be confirmed after deployment.
